content.en:
Build a full writing plan for an academic essay on [topic], length [word count], for [course].

Provide:
- Refined thesis statement
- Proposed outline (introduction, 3-5 body sections, conclusion)
- Main argument and counterargument for each section
- Suggested evidence types (study, theory, data, case)
- Citation reminders for [citation style]
- Common pitfalls to avoid

Keep the plan formal, evidence-oriented, and ready for drafting.

content.en:
Create a literature review blueprint for my thesis on [research topic].

I need:
- Research question refinement
- 5-7 thematic clusters for organizing sources
- Inclusion/exclusion criteria for articles
- A comparison matrix template (author, method, sample, findings, limitations)
- Gap analysis prompts
- A writing flow from background to synthesis to research gap

Focus on academic rigor and clarity.
